caption: A person’s hands are seen interacting with a catalog page showcasing the "FEELS LIKE FROST SUITE." The pages feature various crafting supplies, including patterned papers, stickers, and embellishments, with text such as "Youtide Cheer" and "You warm my heart" appearing on several decorative elements. Product descriptions and pricing are visible, including "Ong - 103474 $78.00." The scene begins with the catalog lying flat on a light-colored surface, showing a variety of winter-themed craft kits. As the sequence progresses, a person's left hand appears on the left edge of the page, and then their right hand enters the frame to touch and point to the items displayed on the page. The person is wearing a dark, long-sleeved garment. The lighting is bright and even, highlighting the textures and colors of the catalog's layout.
